description: Style Notelee brings style into the lives of the fashion conscious, this top with an artsy finesse shows Lee's embracement of the Indie culture with its design details. Wear this with elan and style it with your favourite denims and you're ready to win the appreciation of the world with your good taste.Product DetailsRed top with a mandarin collar and a split neckline, has a half buttoned placket, short sleeves and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coolDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or dry in shadeLow iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (Height 5'8" and chest 33& rdquo ) is wearing a size M
